curated_findings_policy: The findings pages remain the separate three-example static_public_reports_v1 bundle. This catalog drives only the detailed cached explorers.

audio_source.attribution: LibriSpeech dev-clean, prepared by Vassil Panayotov, Guoguo Chen, Daniel Povey, and Sanjeev Khudanpur; derived from public-domain LibriVox recordings.

audio_samples.title: Sir, I exist
audio_samples.reference_transcript: A man said to the universe, sir, I exist.

audio_samples.title: The buzzer's whirr
audio_samples.reference_transcript: The buzzer's whirr triggered his muscles into complete relaxation.

audio_samples.title: The raps at the door
audio_samples.reference_transcript: The little girl had been asleep, but she heard the raps and opened the door.

audio_samples.title: One minute
audio_samples.description: Article substitution around the time buzzer
audio_samples.reference_transcript: One minute, a voice said, and the time buzzer sounded.

audio_samples.title: Oh no, I'm quite sure
audio_samples.reference_transcript: Oh no, I'm quite sure he didn't.

audio_samples.title: The metal forest
audio_samples.reference_transcript: The metal forest is in the great domed cavern, the largest in all our dominions, replied Kaliko.

audio_samples.title: An inexhaustible store
audio_samples.reference_transcript: A red-haired mountain of a man with an apparently inexhaustible store of energy.

audio_samples.title: Physically impossible
audio_samples.reference_transcript: This is physically impossible when conscious.

tts_examples.title: A bridge at S9: emergence, sensitivity, and causal steering
tts_examples.prompt: A bright red train crossed the narrow bridge.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Keep three questions separate: when realized code ID 4106 becomes readable, which prompt tokens local diagnostics emphasize, and what a replayed residual edit causes.

tts_examples.title: Tiny turtles: a nearly monotonic trajectory
tts_examples.prompt: Tiny turtles travel together toward the tide.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Give visitors a clean fitted-rank trajectory while disclosing that it is unusually tidy relative to the screened population.

tts_examples.title: Music fades: readability can reverse
tts_examples.prompt: Music fades as the evening grows quiet.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Counter the impression that fitted readouts must improve layer by layer: the realized code worsens at L4 and again at L12 before resolving late.

tts_examples.title: Which voice? Question contour
tts_examples.prompt: Which voice sounds clearer in this sentence?
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add a held-out interrogative with final question punctuation.

tts_examples.title: Record / record in context
tts_examples.prompt: Record the new record before lunch.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Compare identical spelling in two grammatical and pronunciation contexts.

tts_examples.title: Nine-zero-four as a code
tts_examples.prompt: Enter code nine zero four, then press pound.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add ordered number words and code-like grouping.

tts_examples.title: Ruby ribbon: repeated sounds
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add repeated consonant structure across distinct words.

tts_examples.title: Door left open: two clauses
tts_examples.prompt: The door is open. Please close it.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add a short sentence boundary followed by an imperative.

tts_examples.title: Welcoming Linh Nguyen
tts_examples.prompt: Please welcome Linh Nguyen after lunch.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add less-common proper-name tokens in a familiar context.

tts_examples.title: First, then: two steps
tts_examples.prompt: First, plug in the hub. Then wait ten seconds.
tts_examples.teaching_purpose: Add explicit procedural ordering and a clause boundary.
